view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraints related to the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraints related to the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraints related to the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario where a user accidentally posts data to the wrong business. However, there is no evidence provided that explicitly checks for the enforcement of foreign key constraints that would prevent such actions. The existing evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as successful bookings and user sign-ups, but does not address the specific requirement of validating the foreign key relationships necessary for this scenario.
